title: Score a password
prompt: Write password_strength(pw) returning a score 0-4: +1 if length >= 8, +1 if it has a lowercase letter, +1 if it has an uppercase letter, +1 if it has a digit.

help.plain: Give a password one point for each good property it has: long enough, has lowercase, uppercase, and a digit.
help.analogy: Like a checklist at a door — each box ticked is one point toward getting in.
help.mnemonic: LUUD: Length, Upper, lower, Digit — one point each.
help.nudge: `any(c.isdigit() for c in pw)` tells you if there's a digit anywhere. There's an `islower`/`isupper` too.

details.restate: Rate a password from 0 to 4 by adding a point for each: length 8+, contains lowercase, contains uppercase, contains a digit.

io.because: 8+ chars, has lower, upper, and a digit
